title: Rådhuset
body: Town hall and civic events. The seat of the municipality, down in the city centre.

title: Hålogaland Teater
body: The regional theatre on the southern waterfront — drama, performances and touring productions.

title: Tinghuset
body: The courthouse at Vervet, on the northern harbour front — seat of the district court.

title: Tromsø domkirke
body: The wooden cathedral at the heart of the city centre — one of Norway's largest wooden churches.
